OneLineDescription: Statically distributes SPID Keyword, Spell, and Perk rules to NPC records.
LongDescription: Reads *_DISTR.ini files from the configured Skyrim Data directory and applies supported SPID Keyword, Spell, and Perk distributions through a Synthesis patch. Includes ordered keyword chaining, creation and distribution of missing bare-EditorID keywords, recursive NPC/LVLN template matching, form and string filters, static level and trait checks, stable chance rolls, duplicate prevention, template-list materialization, and compatibility with Synthesis 0.36+ master-overflow split outputs.
